'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 72''' was the seventy-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 14]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]]
*[[Cliegg Lars/Legends|Cliegg Lars]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] and [[Tosche Station/Legends|Tosche Station]]
*[[FA-4 pilot droid/Legends|FA-4]] (Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] pilot)
*[[Jango Fett/Legends#Equipment|Jango Fett's Equipment]]
*''[[Wild Karrde]]''
*[[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Naboo Speeder]]
